summary: Tested TWO new features: System Status Page and Notification Preferences API. Fixed critical bug (STATUS_COLORS.resolved undefined). 11/12 backend tests pass, all frontend features working. System Status page at /system-status shows all 8 modules with operational status, uptime percentages, expandable 90-day history charts, 4 past incidents. Mobile Notification Settings at /m/notification-settings shows Critical Alerts locked ON, plus 6 toggleable preferences. Missing feature: Homepage nav doesn't have link to System Status page.

issues: Missing 'System Status' link in navigation - requirement was 'Homepage nav has links to system status page'

Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/platform: PASS - Returns 200, contains 8 systems with name/status/uptime
Backend_API_Tests.GET_/api/status/platform_structure: PASS - Each system has name, status, uptime fields
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_/api/settings/notifications_persiste: PASS - Updated prefs persist on GET

Frontend_System_Status_Tests.8_module_cards_displayed: PASS - AI Safety Brain, Command Center, Guardian Network, Notification System, Location Intelligence, Incident Replay Engine, Risk Prediction Engine, Telemetry Pipeline
Frontend_System_Status_Tests.Incident_details: PASS - Notification delay, Telemetry slowdown, Scheduled maintenance, Guardian reconnection

Homepage_Navigation_Tests.System_Status_link_in_nav: FAIL - Not present on homepage nav or footer

bugs_fixed.issue: STATUS_COLORS.resolved is undefined causing 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading dot)' error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed fallback from STATUS_COLORS.resolved to STATUS_COLORS.operational

action_items: Add System Status link to homepage navigation (requirement: 'Homepage nav has links to system status page')
critical_code_review_comments: SystemStatusPage.jsx had bug with STATUS_COLORS.resolved not existing - fixed by using operational as fallback
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
90-day uptime history is randomly generated per session (simulated)
Notification preferences API properly requires authentication
Critical Safety Alerts toggle correctly locked (disabled) for safety

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all System Status features working, all Mobile Notification features working)

seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing PostgreSQL data
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Status page at /system-status fully working after bug fix. Uses /api/status/platform endpoint. Module uptimes are hardcoded in MODULE_UPTIMES map. 90-day history randomly generated. Past incidents static. Mobile Notification Settings at /m/notification-settings working with all 6 toggles plus locked Critical Alerts. Notification prefs API requires auth token from login (access_token key). Homepage missing System Status link in nav.
